channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists mapped every neural connection in a fruit fly and found a surprise
item.description: A new connectome maps every neural connection in an adult fruit fly's central nervous system, offering an unprecedented view of its function.

item.title: Earth's first animals barely evolved until sex changed everything
item.description: Earth's earliest animals may have evolved slowly due to asexual reproduction, creating low-competition communities that changed little.

item.title: Glucosamine supplement may accelerate Alzheimer's progression, study finds
item.description: A large study indicates that glucosamine, commonly used for joint pain, may speed up the transition from mild cognitive impairment to Alzheimer's.

item.title: Podcast: Bringing quantum concepts into classrooms
item.description: Erica Carlson and Muhsin Menekse discuss their collaboration to inspire the next STEM workforce through a quantum education program.
